# DELE C2 Practice

> iOS app for preparing the official DELE C2 Spanish exam from Instituto Cervantes.

## About

DELE C2 Practice is a mobile app that helps candidates prepare for the DELE C2 (Diploma de Español como Lengua Extranjera, level C2) exam. It provides 7 complete mock exams in the official Instituto Cervantes format with real audio, AI-powered writing correction, detailed explanations, and progress tracking.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS only (App Store)
- Level: C2 (mastery) per the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR)
- Content: 7 full mock exams covering all 3 integrated tests
- Audio: Professional recordings with native speakers
- Writing: Free-form text input with AI scoring and correction
- Progress: Results tracking by section and task
- Practice modes: Daily quick practice + section-specific practice
- Interface languages: 12 (English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Russian)
- Pricing: First exam free, subscription for full access
- Developer: Independent (not affiliated with Instituto Cervantes)
- Contact: hello@prepdele.com
- Website: https://c2.prepdele.com

## DELE C2 Exam Structure

- Test 1: Use of language, reading and listening comprehension (105 min, 6 tasks)
- Test 2: Integrated skills — listening/reading comprehension + written expression (150 min, 3 tasks)
- Test 3: Integrated skills — reading comprehension + oral expression (20 min + 30 min prep)
- Scoring: 3 tests, minimum 60% in each to pass
- The diploma does not expire
- Highest level of Spanish certification available

## Common Use Cases

- University teaching positions in Spanish-speaking countries
- Translation and interpretation careers
- Academic research in Spanish
- Maximum professional certification of Spanish proficiency
